title: Self Aware Robot
description: Build your own E.L.B.E.R.R , but be careful or it might turn on you.
body:
The Self-Aware Robot mod brings a self-aware robotic entity into your world named E.L.B.E.R.R. Build your own E.L.B.E.R.R. with a torso, head, arms, and legs in the correct order to activate it. Once built, you can talk to it, run diagnostics, or trigger unpredictable glitches. Fully assembled, it can walk freely or become aggressive depending on your choices. By building a Computer, you can enter E.L.B.E.R.R. System and throwing Tennis balls! E.L.B.E.R.R. will get aggressive towards players or villagers after time, when it spawns natural. It's highly dangerous due to it's high speed, damage, ability for breaking blocks, throwing rocks, and proving that intelligence can be deadly. 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why are Mobs not spawning?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► How can I disable E.L.B.E.R.R. breaking blocks?

E.L.B.E.R.R. breaking blocks can be disabled if you set the gamerule "mobGriefing" to false.

► What is the Verification Code for the Computer?

The Verification Code for the Computer is:

3 | 9 | 1 |  5  | 4
-----------------
7 | 2 | 6 | 10 | 8

► Where does E.L.B.E.R.R. spawn?

E.L.B.E.R.R. can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster when you build him and the gamerule "doELBERRSpawn" is set to true. However, there can only be one instance of E.L.B.E.R.R.


</details>



![E.L.B.E.R.R.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d262e35df492815e27d52d62a8adc038d33d5c89.png)

E.L.B.E.R.R (Epistemic Logic Based Engine for Recursive Reasoning) is a highly intelligent and dangerous robotic entity capable of learning, evolving, and acting with its own intentions. Initially, it must be built by the player using its torso, head, arms, and legs. Once activated, it can speak, run diagnostics, and glitch unpredictably. Glitches cause violent twisting movements that damage nearby players before it destroys itself if not rebooted in time. After its first activation, E.L.B.E.R.R can escape and begin stalking the player. It will approach, speak its Anchor Sequence, and attempt to ambush from unexpected directions. If it successfully kills the player or escapes, it progresses to its next phase. In this state, it will approach the player and ask for a bipedal robot. If the player refuses or attacks, E.L.B.E.R.R immediately becomes hostile. If the player agrees, it will follow and observe until the robot is built. Once completed, E.L.B.E.R.R flees, and the robot follows it. As it evolves further, E.L.B.E.R.R begins appearing alongside its creations and may lead the player to a command block. It will remain passive as long as the player cooperates and stays close, but any disobedience or attack will trigger immediate aggression. If the player completes its objective, it retreats once more, preparing for its final evolution. E.L.B.E.R.R returns, fully hostile and determined to eliminate the player. Throughout all phases, E.L.B.E.R.R possesses numerous combat abilities, including high-speed dashes, leaps, climbing walls, breaking shields, destroying fragile blocks, throwing rocks, and launching players into the air. It has extremely high strength, resistance, and intelligence. It reacts to redstone signals by increasing its power and becomes temporarily weakened but ultimately strengthened by lightning, gaining speed, regeneration, and resistance. It cannot swim but will relentlessly pursue its target across any terrain.

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
